title: sphaerocephalus cornigerus
intro: Sphaerocephalus cornigerus, also known as the helmet flower or helmeted globeflower, is a perennial plant species in the family Asteraceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sphaerocephalus cornigerus include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, for its medicinal and therapeutic uses.
